case_title: JUAREZ, GAIL VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, GAIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $92.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,592.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES RECEIPT OF CLAIM AGAINST THE CITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JUAREZ, GAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
